title: Zero Vector — Blue Ocean Factor
description: Captures a Blue Ocean strategy factor: what the industry does, what you do differently, and which strategic action you are taking.

factor.description: The competitive factor being analyzed (e.g., 'Pricing', 'Onboarding Complexity')

industry_standard.description: What the industry typically does for this factor

our_approach.description: What we do differently for this factor

action.description: The Blue Ocean strategic action: eliminate, reduce, raise, or create
